mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_name, contract_type, monthly_supply_kwh, start_date, end_date, rate_per_kwh, monthly_cost_snapshot, status, terminated_at, terminated_by, notes, location_id, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM contracts WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contracts ( supplier_name, contract_type, monthly_supply_kwh, start_date, end_date, rate_per_kwh, monthly_cost_snapshot, status, notes, location_id, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{supplierName}, #{contractType}, #{monthlySupplyKwh}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{ratePerKwh}, #{monthlyCostSnapshot}, #{status}, #{notes}, #{locationId}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE contracts SET supplier_name = #{supplierName}, monthly_supply_kwh = #{monthlySupplyKwh}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, notes = #{notes}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE contracts SET status = #{status}, terminated_at = #{terminatedAt}, terminated_by = #{terminatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT contract_type AS contractType, COALESCE(SUM(monthly_supply_kwh), 0) AS kwh FROM contracts WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND start_date <= #{lastDay} AND end_date >= #{firstDay} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY contract_type
SELECT COUNT(*) AS activeContracts, COALESCE(SUM(monthly_supply_kwh), 0) AS monthlyGuaranteedKwh FROM contracts WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, supplier_name, contract_type, start_date, end_date, monthly_supply_kwh, rate_per_kwh, total_amount, status, location_id, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM contracts WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND end_date <= #{thresholdDate} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY end_date ASC
